note: Global-scope agent capability registry. See docs/skills-manager-design.md §4 for the research behind every entry. reads[] is precedence-ordered where the agent defines precedence; maybeReads[] entries are unconfirmed reads treated as reads for deny guarantees.

codex.note: Deprecated in codex source; usable but flagged when chosen for scoped placement.

antigravity.note: Antigravity global-skills root, empirically read by the CLI variant (agy v1.1.2, 2026-07-15) and documented for the Antigravity 2.0 app; other variants read variant-specific extras (legacy ~/.gemini/skills, CLI ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/skills). Evidence: antigravity.google/docs/skills, docs/cli/plugins, docs/cli/gcli-migration.

claude-code.evidence: Source: upstream/claude-code src/skills/loadSkillsDir.ts (clone 2026-04, stale); docs code.claude.com/docs/en/skills. Does NOT read ~/.agents/skills.
claude-code.agentDefEvidence: Source: upstream/claude-code src/tools/AgentTool/loadAgentsDir.ts:296-393,541-755 + src/utils/markdownConfigLoader.ts:297-372 (userDir = getClaudeConfigHomeDir()/agents, honors CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR); docs code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agents. Markdown + YAML frontmatter, body = system prompt; name+description required. Clone 2026-04 stale.

skillInvocation.evidence: Live two-dummy probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9) + docs code.claude.com/docs/en/skills: disable-model-invocation honored, /name slash invocation works.
skillInvocation.note: Known upstream bugs can also block the user half of a gated skill — fails safe (never model-exposed).

codex.evidence: Source: upstream/codex codex-rs/core-skills/src/loader.rs (clone 2026-07-09): ~/.agents/skills primary user root; $CODEX_HOME/skills deprecated; /etc/codex/skills admin; agents/openai.yaml descriptor.
codex.agentDefEvidence: Source: upstream/codex codex-rs/core/src/config/agent_roles.rs:74-97,474-549,236-316 (config_folder/agents, recursive *.toml agent roles; RawAgentRoleFileToml name/description/nickname_candidates/developer_instructions); docs learn.chatgpt.com/docs/agent-configuration/subagents. TOML, one agent per file. Also one-time migration reads ~/.claude/agents/*.md -> ~/.codex/agents/*.toml (external_agent_config.rs EXTERNAL_AGENT_DIR='.claude').

skillInvocation.evidence: Live probe 2026-07-12: agents/openai.yaml with policy.allow_implicit_invocation: false hides the skill from the model; explicit $name mention still invokes it. Frontmatter disable-model-invocation is ignored (wf_a88d05f6-9b9 probe). Schema: ~/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/references/openai_yaml.md; contract still iterating upstream (openai/codex #19695).

github-copilot.evidence: Docs: docs.github.com copilot-cli add-skills — ~/.copilot/skills and ~/.agents/skills; honors name, description, license, allowed-tools.
github-copilot.agentDefEvidence: Docs: docs.github.com copilot-cli create-custom-agents-for-cli (~/.copilot/agents personal path, .agent.md; home dir wins over repo on name clash) + reference/custom-agents-configuration (required name+description; optional target/tools/model/disable-model-invocation/user-invocable/mcp-servers/metadata). Markdown + YAML frontmatter.

skillInvocation.evidence: Live two-dummy probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9): disable-model-invocation honored. PROBE ONLY — the field is undocumented for copilot skills; behavior could change silently on upgrade.
skillInvocation.note: Undocumented gate — re-verify on every copilot upgrade before relying on it.

gemini-cli.evidence: Source: upstream/gemini-cli packages/core/src/skills/skillManager.ts (clone 2026-05): ~/.gemini/skills then ~/.agents/skills, last-writer-wins; parses name+description only.
gemini-cli.agentDefEvidence: Source: upstream/gemini-cli packages/core/src/config/storage.ts:117-119 (getUserAgentsDir = globalGeminiDir/agents) + packages/core/src/agents/agentLoader.ts:50-119 (localAgentSchema; body = system_prompt) + registry.ts:234-236; docs geminicli.com/docs/core/subagents. Markdown + YAML frontmatter (kind/name/description/display_name/tools/mcp_servers/model/temperature/max_turns/timeout_mins); name+description required. Clone 2026-05.

skillInvocation.evidence: Source pass (wf_a88d05f6-9b9): skillManager.ts parses name+description only; disable-model-invocation ignored; no per-skill user invocation. Runtime probe was auth-blocked — medium confidence, source-based.

opencode.evidence: Source: upstream/opencode packages/opencode/src/skill/index.ts (clone 2026-07-09): scans ~/.claude/skills, ~/.agents/skills, opencode config dirs; duplicate names last-write-wins.
opencode.agentDefEvidence: Source: upstream/opencode packages/core/src/config/plugin/agent.ts:19-23,31-44,80-159 (globs {agent,agents}/**/*.md; agentKeys model/variant/request/system/description/mode/hidden/color/steps/disabled/permissions; name derived from path) + global.ts:13,64 (config = xdgConfig/opencode, OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR override); docs opencode.ai/docs/agents. Markdown + YAML frontmatter. Dir casing agent/ (singular) per opencode.ai; loader also accepts plural agents/.

skillInvocation.evidence: Live two-dummy probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9): disable-model-invocation ignored; no per-skill user invocation for skills. Upstream explicitly declined per-skill gating (opencode #11972).

pi.evidence: Source: upstream/pi-mono packages/coding-agent/src/core/skills.ts (clone 2026-05): ~/.pi/agent/skills + ~/.agents/skills; honors disable-model-invocation; does NOT scan ~/.claude/skills.
pi.agentDefEvidence: Source: upstream/pi-mono packages/coding-agent (clone 2026-05): core CLI ships no user-global agent-definition directory (no discoverAgents/agents-dir loader under src). The only such loader is an opt-in example extension examples/extensions/subagent/agents.ts:88,97-115 (reads ~/.pi/agents/*.md), not the shipped CLI.

skillInvocation.evidence: Live two-dummy probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9) + source skills.ts (honors disable-model-invocation): gate honored; user invokes via /skill:name.

cursor.evidence: Docs: cursor.com/docs/skills — reads ~/.agents/skills, ~/.cursor/skills, plus ~/.claude/skills and ~/.codex/skills for compatibility; honors paths, disable-model-invocation, metadata. Note: ~/.cursor/skills-cursor observed on-machine; discrepancy tracked in design doc open items.
cursor.agentDefEvidence: Docs: cursor.com/docs/subagents — ~/.cursor/agents + .cursor/agents; Markdown + YAML frontmatter (name defaults to filename, description, model default 'inherit', readonly, is_background); invoke via /name; project wins on conflict. Also reads .claude/agents and .codex/agents for compatibility (cross-harness read, docs-confirmed).

skillInvocation.evidence: Live two-dummy probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9) + docs cursor.com/docs/skills (disable-model-invocation listed as honored): gate honored; slash-palette invocation works.

grok.note: Deliberately NOT unscopedOwnDir: grok is reached only through its maybe-reads of the shared/claude dirs, never an own-dir unscoped placement (the narrow contract formerly hardcoded in the solver).
grok.evidence: Docs: docs.x.ai skills-plugins-marketplaces — ~/.grok/skills + config [skills] paths; Claude-compat and ~/.agents support ambiguous, treated as maybe-reads for deny guarantees.
grok.agentDefEvidence: No source or documentation evidence gathered in the AUR-614 passes that grok reads a user-global agent-definition directory. Unknown; do not assume support.

skillInvocation.evidence: Live two-dummy probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9) + docs docs.x.ai (disable-model-invocation and user-invocable are first-class documented fields): gate honored; slash invocation works.
skillInvocation.note: Also honors a separate user-invocable field.

droid.evidence: ~/.agents/skills read user-verified on-machine 2026-07-10 (Factory docs lag; they list only ~/.factory/skills globally). Honors user-invocable, disable-model-invocation; project dirs .factory/skills and .agent/skills (singular).
droid.agentDefEvidence: No agent-definition-directory evidence gathered in the AUR-614 source/docs passes for Factory/droid. Unknown; do not assume support.

skillInvocation.evidence: Live two-dummy probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9) + Factory docs (disable-model-invocation and user-invocable both documented): gate honored; slash invocation works.
skillInvocation.note: Also honors a separate user-invocable field.

antigravity.evidence: Empirical probe of agy v1.1.2 (2026-07-15): global skills are discovered folder+SKILL.md across three roots — ~/.gemini/config/skills (own dir, also documented for the Antigravity 2.0 app), legacy ~/.gemini/skills (the gemini dir → maybe-read), and CLI ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/skills (appDataDir, not modeled — no other agent reads it, so a directory entry would carry no deny-guarantee weight). A symlinked folder in ~/.gemini/config/skills is followed (verified: canary symlink surfaced in `agy --print` skill list). Home-level ~/.agents/skills is NOT read (confirmed). Config/skills is read per-variant, not 'by all variants' as previously claimed. Evidence: antigravity.google/docs/skills, docs/cli/plugins, docs/cli/gcli-migration.
antigravity.agentDefEvidence: agy v1.1.2 `agy agents` discovers flat <name>.md and <name>/agent.md in ~/.gemini/agents/ and ~/.gemini/config/agents/ (empirical 2026-07-15); skm's gemini render in ~/.gemini/agents/ is discovered as-is. Served via the gemini render — no separate antigravity render channel (avoids duplicate discovery of the same agent from two dirs). Officially documented frontmatter: name + description only; extra fields tolerated.

skillInvocation.evidence: Empirical probe of agy v1.1.2 (2026-07-15) + docs antigravity.google/docs/skills: SKILL.md frontmatter is name (optional) + description (required) only; no disable-model-invocation or any skill-gating field exists. Antigravity's permissions engine gates tools, not skills. No per-skill user invocation. Treat as a no-gate agent (ADR 0011) → gated skills are excluded by default unless a per-skill permissive opt-in accepts the prose gate.

hermes.evidence: Source: upstream/hermes-agent tools/skills_tool.py (clone 2026-05): ~/.hermes/skills + config skills.external_dirs; first-seen name wins. Add-only policy per this repo's Hermes rules.
hermes.agentDefEvidence: Source: upstream/hermes-agent tools/delegate_tool.py (clone 2026-05): subagents are config-key driven (delegation.* in config.yaml, dynamic spawn, max_spawn_depth); no ~/.hermes/agents/*.md|*.yaml loader (no agents-directory glob/listdir in *.py). ~/.hermes used only for logs/state.

skillInvocation.evidence: Live probe (wf_a88d05f6-9b9) + source grep of tools/skills_tool.py: zero references to disable-model-invocation or any gating field; skill stays model-exposed. Slash invocation works.

aider.evidence: Source: upstream/aider (clone 2026-05): no skill loading code exists.
aider.agentDefEvidence: Not investigated for agent-definition directories in the AUR-614 passes. Unknown; do not assume support.
